cards.hook: Here's what happened in crypto today
cards.caption: Generic daily-roundup filler with no angle, hook, or contrarian edge — pure aggregator noise.
Tokenized stocks: $34B/month, up 40x in a year. Nvidia, Tesla, AI names now trade on-chain. TradFi is quietly moving onto DeFi rails. The signal my feed keeps before the timeline notices.
cards.stance: RWAs, not memecoins, are the real bridge between Wall Street and crypto.

cards.hook: Same card, same checkout, different rails underneath
cards.caption: On-topic but reads as a Trust Wallet Card ad, not a curated insight — thin, promotional, no proof.

cards.hook: Knowing how to code won't save you from these scams
cards.caption: Knowing how to code won't save you from these scams. Technical scams now target the devs who think they're too smart to fall for them. Read this before you sign the next transaction.
cards.stance: The most exploitable person in crypto is the engineer who's sure they can't be fooled.

cards.hook: A monarch's inheritance gets more scrutiny than your DeFi yields
cards.caption: A French dev's take: a king's inheritance faces more scrutiny than your DeFi yields. Decentralization as the only real escape from the audit. The spicy takes my feed keeps.
cards.stance: DeFi's real product isn't yield — it's exit from the surveillance state.

cards.hook: DeFi hacks are becoming a hidden tax on your yield
cards.caption: DeFi hacks are turning high yields into a hidden liquidity tax — you're funding the exploits. BTC's at $58.5K and bearish. The uncomfortable read my feed surfaces early.
cards.stance: Your 'high APY' is just pre-paid exploit insurance you never agreed to.

cards.hook: A Solana DeFi protocol torched $661K with one code bug
cards.caption: A Solana DeFi protocol lost $661K to a single programming blunder — not a hack, a typo-level mistake. This is why you read the audit. Found before the timeline piled on.
cards.stance: Most DeFi losses aren't hacks — they're self-inflicted by unaudited code.

cards.hook: Banks credit optimism to RWA tokenization
cards.caption: Mid-thread fragment with no standalone hook — dry, contextless, and overlaps card-10's stronger RWA angle.
